name: Baby Unicorn (Fisherman)
text: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

name: Baby Unicorn (Forest)
text: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

name: Baby Unicorn (Pirate)
text: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

name: Baby Unicorn (Safari)
text: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

name: Eager Adventurer Unicorn
text: OOOH! What's that??

name: Glamping Unicorn
text: What do you mean I'm not roughing it? My phone has, like, zero bars?

name: Indoor Rockclimber Unicorn
text: Always reach for new heights. Just don't bump your head on the ceiling.

name: Land Lubber Unicorn
text: A little help? I'm still learning the ropes.

name: Bungee Jumping Unicorn
text: If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, you may: SACRIFICE a Downgrade card. OR Return this card to your hand.

name: Cutthroat Captain Unicorn
text: When this card enters your Stable, you may: STEAL a Baby Unicorn card. OR Bring a Basic Unicorn card from the discard pile into your Stable.

name: Extreme Adventurer Unicorn
text: Basic Unicorn cards cannot enter your Stable. If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DRAW a card.

name: Fearless Unicorn
text: If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, you may add an Instant card from the discard pile to your hand.

name: First Mer-mate Unicorn
text: If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, you may: DRAW 2 cards. OR Bring a Basic Unicorn card from your hand into your Stable.

name: Fisherman Unicorn
text: When this card enters your Stable, you may look at another player's hand. Choose a card and add it to your hand.

name: Hornswoggler Unicorn
text: When this card enters your Stable, you may: DISCARD your hand, then DRAW 3 cards. OR Trade hands with any other player.

name: Pillaging Pirate Unicorn
text: When this card enters your Stable, you may: STEAL an Upgrade card. OR Move a Downgrade card in your Stable to another player's Stable.

name: Salty Seadogicorn
text: When this card enters your Stable, you may: Force each other player to DISCARD a card. OR DRAW a card.

name: Stowaway Unicorn
text: When this card enters your Stable, you may DRAW a card and reveal it. If it is a Unicorn, Upgrade, or Downgrade card, bring it into your Stable.

name: Survivalist Unicorn
text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DISCARD a card, then SACRIFICE a Downgrade card.

name: Vagabond Unicorn
text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DISCARD a card, then pull a card at random from another player's hand.

name: Glowing Horn
text: SACRIFICE a card, then DESTROY a card. OR Bring a card from the discard pile into your Stable.

name: Metal Detector
text: DRAW 3 cards and DISCARD a card. OR Add a card from the discard pile to your hand.

name: Mysterious Compass
text: DISCARD 3 cards, then take another turn. OR Move a Unicorn card in your Stable to another player's Stable, then STEAL a Unicorn card from that player's Stable.

name: Silver Tongue
text: Force each other player to reveal their hand to you. OR Force each other player to give you a card from their hand.

name: The Great Baby Heist
text: DISCARD 2 cards, then bring 2 Baby Unicorn cards from the Nursery into your Stable.

name: Unicorn Shovel
text: Bring a Unicorn card from the discard pile into your Stable. OR Add 2 Unicorn cards from the discard pile to your hand.

name: Ancient Ritual
text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may SACRIFICE a Unicorn card, then DRAW 3 cards.

name: Pit Covered in Leaves
text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may SACRIFICE this card, then STEAL a Unicorn card.

name: Royal Hooves
text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may pull a card at random from another player's hand instead of drawing a card for your Draw phase.

name: Unicorn Survival Kit
text: Each time one of your Unicorn cards would be sacrificed or destroyed, you may DISCARD 2 cards instead.

name: Broken Sundial
text: Skip your Beginning of Turn phase.

name: Extremely Small Backpack
text: Each time you DRAW any number of cards, DISCARD a card. If at any time you have no cards in your hand, move this card to another player's Stable.

name: The Black Spot
text: You cannot win the game if you have a Basic Unicorn card in your Stable.

name: Unicorn Overboard
text: Each time one of your Unicorn cards is sacrificed or destroyed, DISCARD a card.

name: Fishing Rod
text: Play this card when another player tries to STEAL a card. Move the card that would be stolen into your Stable instead.

name: Flare Gun
text: Play this card at the beginning of another player's turn. That player must skip their Beginning of Turn phase and their Draw phase.

name: Neigh, Mate!
text: Play this card when another player tries to play a card. Stop their card from being played and send it to the discard pile.

name: Unicorn Net
text: Play this card when any player tries to SACRIFICE or DESTROY a card. Add that card to your hand instead.
